$operator.summary: Pancreator self-development verification commands grouped by workflow purpose.
$operator.note: This template applies only when developing Pancreator itself. Embedded installations receive repository-checks.json instead.

configuration.description: Validate Pancreator governance, workflow, and projection configuration.

static.description: Run Pancreator formatting, type, and lint checks.

fast.description: Run Pancreator's compiled automated test suite.

full.description: Run Pancreator's complete tests and configured coverage thresholds.
